channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Meghan Trainor @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-09 01:30 — Meghan Trainor at Chase Center. ZAYN's return to the stage with his Konnakol Tour promises a unique blend of pop and cultural influences, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 → 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: Tori Amos @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-30 03:00 — Tori Amos at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Evanescence's world tour with Spiritbox and Nova Twins is a strong lineup that combines rock and alternative sounds, drawing significant interest.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Neighbourhood's upcoming tour is highly anticipated, showcasing their unique sound and strong fanbase.

item.title: i-dle @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-22 03:00 — i-dle at Oakland Arena. i-dle's world tour will attract K-pop fans, highlighting their rising global popularity and energetic performances.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's SURFILMUSIC Tour combines music with a surf culture theme, appealing to a laid-back audience.

item.title: Santana @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-10 02:00 — Santana at Shoreline Amphitheatre. J. Cole's Fall-Off Tour is a significant event in hip-hop, promising a powerful live experience from one of the genre's leading artists.

item.title: Old 97's @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-08-06 03:00 — Old 97's at The Fillmore. Old 97's continue to deliver their signature alt-country sound, appealing to fans of the genre.

item.title: Three Days Grace @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-19 03:00 — Three Days Grace at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley.

item.title: Young the Giant @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-20 01:00 — Young the Giant at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley.

item.title: The Fray @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-24 01:00 — The Fray at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley.
